_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromatosis-1 heterozygosity increases microglia in a spatially and temporally restricted pattern relevant to mouse optic glioma formation and growth.

_contextSnippet: 2-fold increase in the number of microglia in the optic nerves of Nf1+/- mice compared to their WT littermates
details: Show temporally-restricted 2-fold increase in optic nerve microglia at 6 weeks but not at 3 weeks or 3 months of age
